identity.fantasy: Become a brave little pond frog and cross the water one glowing lily-pad hop at a time.
identity.playerVerb: Crouch gently and rise to spring the frog toward the next lily pad.
identity.targetMetaphor: A trail of broad lily pads that wake, glow, and ripple when the frog lands.

beats.purpose: Learn two slow, forgiving hops near the pond edge.
Cross three deeper-water pads with a slightly fuller crouch.
Finish four lively hops and reach the glowing far bank.

presenter.continuousFeedback: The frog compresses with the squat state, arcs during cooldown, advances to the next pad, and updates a localized trail meter every frame.
presenter.scoreAndResolution: Three escalating pond sections show room-readable hop totals and finish with a localized full-field pond-crossed celebration.
